zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hebden於大約1375年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Nicholas Hebdon58歲，母親Katherine de Wyham22歲。她於1400年與Thomas Dymoke在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年2月7日在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾馬雷哈姆 奧 馮 希爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hebden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hebdon  .

variants.name: Hebdon
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): habitational name from Hebden in Linton (Yorkshire), probably from Old English hēope ‘rose hip’ or hēopa ‘bramble’ + denu ‘valley’. Roger de Mowbray granted the manor of Hebden to Uctred de Hebden, a descendant of Uctred Earl of Northumberland (died 1016), in 1120.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hebden was born about 1375, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Nicholas Hebdon, was 58 and her mother, Katherine de Wyham, was 22. She married Thomas Dymoke in 1400, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 7 February 1453, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hebden est née environ 1375, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Hebdon, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Wyham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Dymoke en 1400, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1453, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hebden um 1375 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Hebdon 58 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Wyham 22. Sie hat 1400 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England Thomas Dymoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1453 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Dymoke nel 1400, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hebdenが約1375年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Hebdonは58歳，母Katherine de Wyhamは22歳であった。1400年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーでThomas Dymokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年2月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマレハム オン ス ヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.Mareham-on-the-Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 마함  테 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hebden(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Hebdon(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Wyham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 Thomas Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 2월 7일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 마함  테 힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hebden nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Hebdon, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Wyham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Dymoke em 1400, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1453, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Mareham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Mareham-on-the-Hill, Lincolnshire, Engla: марэам он т хилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hebden родилась около 1375 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Hebdon было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Wyham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Dymoke в 1400 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 7 февраля 1453 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности марэам он т хилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
